phases.name: Core data model and regex engine

steps.name: Match highlights data model and regex bridge primitives
criteria: EditorState exposes a match_highlights field (line -> list of column-range+color segments), independent of line_styles
Bridge primitive regex-find-all populates match_highlights with all non-overlapping matches and returns integer match count
Bridge primitive regex-valid? returns 1 for compilable patterns, nil otherwise, with no side effects
Bridge primitive clear-match-highlights removes all entries from match_highlights
Invalid regex pattern sets editor message and produces zero highlights

steps.name: Render match highlights as background overlay on buffer content
criteria: Match highlight ranges render with distinct background color on buffer text
Syntax highlighting foreground colors remain visible within highlighted matches
Match highlights render above line_backgrounds but below cursor in visual priority
Lines with no match highlights render identically to before

steps.name: Regex wizard plugin with bottom panel and manual regex input
criteria: Keybinding opens a bottom panel with text input for manual regex entry
Each keystroke in the panel triggers live match highlighting across the entire buffer
Match count displayed in the wizard panel equals actual highlighted range count
Escape closes the wizard panel and clears all match highlights from buffer

steps.name: E2E test for regex wizard walking skeleton
criteria: E2E test opens a file with known content, activates the regex wizard, types a pattern, saves and verifies file is unmodified
E2E test confirms wizard panel closes on Escape without persisting highlights
